achievement: Processed and labelled over 20,000 data samples with 98% accuracy, contributing to training of supervised machine learning models for boosted speech recognition performance and annotation quality.

Conducted exploratory data analysis (EDA) and collaborated with cross-functional teams to align data pipelines and reporting structures with key business KPIs, restructuring data relevance and decision-making accuracy.

Developed anomaly detection and pattern recognition tools to identify data inconsistencies and revamp overall data quality, facilitating more reliable analytics and risk assessment across large datasets.
Automated custom data labelling pipelines using Python, increasing annotation efficiency by 40% and enhancing scalability and consistency in machine learning training workflows.

Performed inventory optimization and improved reporting accuracy by developing and refining interactive dashboards in Amazon Quick sight, catalyzing data-driven decision-making and operational insights.
Improved annotation efficiency by 40% by developing custom automation tools and workflows, streamlining data labelling processes for machine learning model training.
Utilized Jira and Confluence within an Agile team environment to manage project workflows, facilitate sprint planning, and ensure task visibility and collaboration across stakeholders.

Calculated and reported Net Asset Values (NAVs) for assigned funds with accuracy and timeliness, ensuring full compliance with State Street policies, regulatory standards, and client-specific requirements.

Reconciled cash, asset, and financial transactions to ensure accuracy across multiple accounts; identified and resolved discrepancies, supporting timely and accurate financial reporting and compliance with internal controls.
Reviewed and processed fund expenses, including management and performance fees, ensuring alignment with client agreements, industry standards, and internal compliance policies.
Associated in preparing fund data for audits and regulatory reporting, ensuring all activities complied with applicable regulatory requirements and State Street’s internal audit standards.
Provided friendly and e!cient customer service via phone and email, handling an average of 100 inquiries per day with a 95% resolution rate.
Constantly exceeded individual performance metrics, including average call handling time and first-call resolution rate.
Communicated with customers via Inbound calls, Outbound calls and emails.
Assisted customers in booking appointments using Salesforce, payments, answering questions and queries via Zendesk ticketing system, and providing product recommendations.

professional_summary:
Motivated and technically inclined professional with a strong foundation in cloud technologies, 
SQL, and customer support. Knowledgeable in troubleshooting, data warehousing concepts, and 
cloud service providers through academic projects and self-guided learning. Familiar with 
Snowflake, ETL processes, and basic scripting, with a growing understanding of distributed 
systems and performance optimization. Known for strong communication skills, a collaborative 
mindset, and a proactive approach to learning in fast-paced environments. Eager to contribute to 
Snowflake’s mission while growing into a Cloud Support Engineering role.
